metadata.description: Plan-first AI coding adapter: detect → plan → apply with stable run contracts, artifact persistence, simplified recommendations, and thin Claude/Cursor integration.

plugins.name: harness-coding-protocol
plugins.description: Plan-first contract-driven adapter for AI coding environments. Core: detect project → generate plan → apply changes. Features: stable run artifacts (.harness/runs/<id>/), simplified recommendations (top 3 default), incremental merge, backup/rollback, thin Claude adapter. Root truth: AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md + steering/. CLI-first with IDE integration.
features: 🎯 Plan-first architecture: stable contract between detect/generate/execute
📦 Run artifact persistence: every command generates .harness/runs/<id>/
🔍 Smart detection: frameworks, tools, commands, tech stack
🔄 Incremental merge: safe updates with conflict detection
💾 Backup & rollback: automatic backups with restore capability
🤖 Thin Claude adapter: calls CLI, reads artifacts, translates output
📊 Stable exit codes: 0-6 for CI/CD integration
🛡️ Root truth priority: AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md as canonical sources
commands: harness detect [target] - Detect project and generate run artifact
harness plan [target] --from-run <id> - Generate plan from detection
harness apply [target] --plan <id> - Execute plan with backup
harness setup [target] - Composite: detect + plan + apply
useCases: Review before apply: harness detect → plan → review → apply
CI/CD integration: harness detect --json && harness plan --json
